title: Personal User - download/install, Login with Gmail, not present on any Lens tenant
scenario: Verify that a personal user with a paired headset, who logs in with Gmail during onboarding, sees correct headset data in the app and is not registered on any Lens tenant.
steps: 1. Pair a headset with a personal user's mobile device.
2. User downloads/installs the app and logs in with their Gmail account during onboarding.
3. Ensure the user is not present on any Lens tenant.
4. Verify that the headset appears in the app with correct data (image, settings).
5. Verify that the personal user is not registered on any Lens tenant.
expected: The headset appears in the app with correct data (image, settings), and the personal user is not registered on any Lens tenant.
